info.name: Catering&InvManagement
info.description: Full API collection for the Catering & Inventory Management system. Covers Authentication, Profile, Admin (Users, Roles, Categories, Menu Items, Stock, Orders, Messages, Audit, Dashboard, Tenant), Kitchen Staff (Order Queue, Menu Availability, Transactions), and User (Menu, Orders) endpoints.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Public endpoints for login, logout, and password reset. Login returns a Bearer token stored automatically by the test script.

item.name: Profile
item.description: Authenticated endpoints for the currently logged-in user to view and manage their own profile and password. Available to all roles.

item.name: Admin
User
item.description: Admin user management — listing, creating (single and bulk), editing, toggling active status, deleting, and role inspection.

item.name: Roles
item.description: Read-only role management endpoints. Returns available roles and their associated permissions (FK relationship demo).

item.name: Category
item.description: Admin category management for grouping menu items (e.g. Main Course, Beverages). Categories cannot be updated — delete and recreate if needed.

item.name: Menu_Items
item.description: Admin management of menu items — CRUD, availability toggling, stock restocking, and low-stock alerts.

item.name: Stock
item.description: Dedicated stock management endpoints for viewing current stock levels, full stock history per item, manual restocking, and recording sales.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Admin dashboard endpoints providing daily summaries, filtered day views, and weekly revenue breakdowns.

item.name: Tenant
item.description: Returns the tenant's own configuration and metadata. Single endpoint — no create or edit exposed here.

item.name: Order_History
item.description: Admin order history with flexible filtering by date range, status, staff name, or menu item name. Also supports viewing a single order in detail.

item.name: Messages

body.raw:
{
  "receiver_id": 2,
  "title": "Please check the fryers",
  "content": "A customer reported the fries were cold. Please verify the left fryer is maintaining temperature.",
  "tag": "staff_duty",
  "priority": "medium"
}

item.description: Internal messaging between admin and kitchen staff. Supports sending, listing, marking as read, and deleting messages.

item.name: Audit
item.description: Read-only audit trail endpoints. Returns change logs for menu items, categories, and a global recent-changes feed.
Admin-only and shared Admin+Kitchen Staff endpoints covering user management, categories, menu items, stock, orders, messages, audit, dashboard, and tenant info.

item.name: Kitchen Staff
Order_Queue
item.description: Kitchen staff view of active orders. Supports listing all queued orders, viewing a single order, and updating order status through the kitchen workflow.

item.name: Transactions
item.description: Allows kitchen staff to record a payment transaction against a completed order. Typically called when a customer pays at the counter.

item.name: Menu_Availability
item.description: Lets kitchen staff update item availability in real time and submit restock requests to the admin when supplies run low.
Endpoints exclusive to the kitchen_staff role. Covers the incoming order queue, per-order status management, transaction recording, and menu availability control.

item.name: User
Menu
item.description: Public-facing menu browsing for the user role. Only returns available items — unavailable or deleted items are excluded.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Customer order management — place new orders, track order status, make modifications before preparation starts, and cancel if needed.
Customer-facing endpoints for browsing the menu and placing, viewing, updating, or cancelling their own orders.
